name: Bifrost
longDescription:
Bifrost is a high-performance, enterprise-grade AI gateway that is OpenAI-compatible and unifies 23+ LLM providers behind a single API. It acts as a drop-in replacement for OpenAI with adaptive load balancing across providers.

Features include an adaptive load balancer, support for 1000+ models, sub-100µs overhead, a built-in configuration and monitoring web UI, and zero-config startup. Providers and API keys are configured through the web interface.
description: A high-performance OpenAI-compatible AI gateway unifying 23+ LLM providers.
